title: Per Minecart Max Speed Customiser
description: Fine‑tune the max speed of each minecart individually!
body:
# Per-Minecart Max Speed Customiser

Per-Minecart Max Speed Customiser is a Fabric mod that gives you precise control over individual minecarts in your world. Instead of relying on the minecartMaxSpeed gamerule, this mod allows you to **set custom maximum speeds for each minecart entity**, independently.

Using the **Minecart Wrench tool** included in the mod, you can fine-tune the speed of minecarts one by one, enabling advanced and creative minecart-based transportation systems tailored to your needs!

## ⚠️ Important: Minecart Improvements Experiment must be enabled
![Minecart Improvements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd90e7e81901bd63dd4c32524f40556f971de610_0.webp)

## How to use
1. Equip the wrench provided by the mod.
2. **Crouch** (sneak) and **right-click** on a minecart this will bring up a UI wherein you can configure the max speed.

You can also directly summon a minecart with a specific speed using the following command: 
```
/summon minecart ~ ~ ~ {CustomMaxSpeed:100.0}
```

If you don't manually adjust a minecart's speed, it will default to using Minecraft's minecartMaxSpeed gamerule for determining speed.
